prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: Her Silent Christmas Alibi
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Lifetime Original
Tagline: Love lives here. So does arson.
Theme: A town never forgets. It just redecorates.
Omen: phone static saying her name
Relationship dynamic: secret half sibling
Props: ceramic owl, boat key, scarf with impossible timing

Cast:
- Wyatt Dane | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=bakery owner | threat_aura=0.36 | space=marina tackle room described as just storage | secrets=buried one traumatic detail under work for years; has an unsent email that would destroy a family
- Evelyn Lark | archetype=decorative_husband | role=male_interest_or_threat | job=regional dentist | threat_aura=0.71 | space=toolshed described as paperwork I have not gone through yet | secrets=deleted a voicemail and regretted it spiritually; has a storage unit he refuses to explain
- Mara Sutton | archetype=chaotic_best_friend | role=best_friend | job=salon owner | threat_aura=0.42 | space=dock office with a desk nobody fully claims | secrets=may die first or survive unbelievably
- Claire Bell | archetype=mysterious_elegant_woman | role=elegant_wildcard | job=therapist | threat_aura=0.72 | space=side room with a space heater and old family records | secrets=had brunch with someone officially deceased
- Noah Vale | archetype=divorced_redemption_dad | role=secondary_male_pressure | job=hardware store owner | threat_aura=0.52 | space=retreat cabin with candles, blankets, and difficult silence | secrets=knows where evidence should have been; ignored a warning text on the worst possible night
- Rachel Bell | archetype=intuitive_disaster | role=secondary_witness | job=substitute teacher | threat_aura=0.47 | space=retreat cabin with candles, blankets, and difficult silence | secrets=keeps screenshots like religious texts; saw the wrong person near the lake once and never shut up about it
- Gavin Vale | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Rachel Pruitt | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Evelyn Lark is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Wyatt Dane says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Alder Ridge.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Evelyn?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Gavin. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Wyatt. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The ceramic owl is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Claire."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."

- expanded_synopsis: string, 180-320 words
- scene_paragraphs: array of 6 strings, each 90-180 words, representing juicy HallTime scene expansion
